title: Fix missing whitespace between bold and regular text
description: Added explicit {" "} JSX whitespace around all inline <strong> elements in legal docs and the upgrade modal; removed incorrect CSS letter-spacing workaround; reverted visual spacing overrides.

title: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility refactor + text spacing fixes
description: Skip link, semantic landmarks (main/nav/footer), aria-labels, focus-visible ring, sr-only class, aria-hidden decorations, role=alert/status, aria-expanded/pressed, accessible tables, drag divider keyboard support, and improved text spacing around bold elements.

title: Tiered UI gradients, quadrupled credits, multi-stage fetch
description: Tiered UI gradients per plan (free/pro/dev), quadrupled free & pro credits, refactored multi-stage weather/AI fetching workflow with intermediate state and slide-up reveal animation.

title: BYOK localStorage + gender persistence + legal doc updates
description: Fixed gender preference to persist in localStorage. Added BYOK API key UI for Pro/Dev users stored locally only. Updated Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to accurately reflect local-only storage.

title: Fix broken Markdown table in README
description: Removed extra pipe from the Plans table separator row so the table renders correctly on GitHub (header had 3 columns, separator had 4).

title: Fix Demo Access functional bypass & environment gating
description: Tightened demo login to only allow VERCEL_ENV=preview or NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_PREVIEW=true. Updated demo user identity (id, name, email). Button now hidden by default outside preview.

title: Fix build error & add AI changelog instructions
description: Fixed TypeScript TS2322 error in the style API route by casting Supabase settings fields to string | undefined. Added AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md so AI agents know to update changelog.json after every change.

title: Changelog & DX Integration
description: Added a GitHub-style changelog with vertical timeline on the homepage and settings. Implemented demo login for preview environments with 10× free-tier limits. Added Simple Mode persistence via localStorage. Unread changelog indicators appear in the menu and footer until dismissed.

title: Legal Overhaul & Simple Mode
description: Rewrote Terms of Service and Privacy Policy with Plain-English summaries. Added a Simple Mode toggle that lets users switch between legalese and human-readable text. Legal pages now reflect the current payment model and data practices.

title: Payment & Subscription Pivot
description: Migrated billing to a credit-based model for Pro users (50 credits/week, auto-reset). Added Pay As You Go plan (coming soon). Improved account page to show live credit balance and usage stats.

title: Dashboard Layout Improvements
description: Added drag-to-resize column divider, extra side spacing toggle, and persistent layout mode preferences. Dashboard now listens for a skystyle-preferences-updated event so settings reflect instantly.

title: Sky Style — Public Launch
description: Initial public release. AI-powered outfit recommendations based on real-time multi-source weather data. Supports metric/imperial units, closet management, BYOK API keys for Pro users, and custom weather sources.
